[00:00-00:02] Shot 1: The taxi, a yellow New York City taxi, begins to move from the curb into Times Square, street-level view. - Camera: Eye-level, Framing: Medium, Movement: Slow Tracking, Subject: taxi.
[00:02-00:05] Shot 2: Macro close-up of chrome trim and paint texture as the taxi pushes in toward the frame. - Camera: Macro, Framing: Close, Movement: Push-in, Subject: taxi.
[00:05-00:08] Shot 3: The taxi travels through Times Square in a wide, street-level view, with neon signs towering overhead as a light track keeps pace along the curb. - Camera: Eye-level, Framing: Wide, Movement: Light Track, Subject: taxi.
parsed_generation.narration: A yellow New York City taxi driving through Times Square, street-level view. In Shot 1, the taxi begins to move from the curb into Times Square, captured at eye-level with a medium framing as the camera slowly tracks its first deliberate motion. In Shot 2, a macro close-up reveals chrome trim and paint texture as the taxi pushes in toward the frame. In Shot 3, the taxi travels through Times Square in a wide, street-level view, with neon signs towering overhead as a light track keeps pace along the curb. Together, the sequence offers a focused, temporal view of the topic, highlighting how a yellow taxi navigates Times Square from street level.
